"'''Underworld Appendix: Swoops, Spice, and Wretched Rogues'''" is an online supplement to ''[[Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy]]'' in [[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]]. The article is written by [[Abel G. Peña]] with [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]], and is an exclusive [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] publication.
